quote: "Thank you Pooja for the wonderful workshops you conduct …..always well organised and planned to the T with detailed in depth recipes and follow up sessions ..I have been following your journey right from 2020.. My first one being the Papparoti one and from that time onwards I have lost the count of your classes that I have enrolled. Your classes are not only value for money but there is immense sense of satisfaction in learning as your recipes are foolproof and turn out perfect on the first try which just gives us confidence to bake and learn more. You as a teacher and we as students have always got better with every session. In Eggless baking you an authority and an epitome of dedicated teaching."

"What really stands out is the level of student engagement after your class. The WhatsApp support group stays active and buzzing — it's filled with questions, recreations, and shared enthusiasm. That kind of sustained interaction is something I haven't seen in most workshops. In fact, while many instructors market their classes well beforehand, the post-class follow-through is often missing. With you, the real magic begins after the class.
And I have to say this - your recipes are so authentic and complete. You don't hold anything back, and that's why recreations by your students are so spot-on. That makes all the difference."

"E verything is the result of the amount of hard work and the honesty with which you teach your workshop. You also teach with this feeling that your students should do well, a very motherly instinct! I have completed my pastry Diploma and still take your classes because I just want to keep taking them. I got into this by taking your classes. Always very grateful and thankful for having found a teacher like you."

" Making notes is one thing and providing notes with every minute detail, variation, options n not to forget even the pictorial representation is another level thing.. No wonder your students never skip any workshop..

Jo ek baar aapka hua, wo bas ho kar hi reh gaya.. You are amazing not only as a mentor but as an expert teacher who knows how to take along all the students, be it hand holding of the weakest one or be it answering any super silly query..
Exceptionally commendable and extensive hard work done in all writing and compiling.. Three cheers to you n your able guided team for every effort out in..
I guess eventually my words will fall short telling how wonderful you are.. "

"Hi Pooja. I'm blown away from the PDFs that you have curated. Its so extensive. The recipes, the notes, the theory. So much hardwork put in. The love for teaching your students with all your knowledge is commendable.

"Hello Pooja!! A big big thank you to you!! You are the best mentor l've ever come across. And I must say that each time you come up with a new workshop, you raise your bar higher n higher. Pooja you are literally spoon feeding us by giving minutest of the details. I've attended like 10-12 workshops of yours so far and made so many stuff from the workshops to sell... You give all the information about oven settings for different ovens, the yield, the pan sizes for scaling recipes, the packaging ideas, pricing points and and this time I was completely blown away when you revealed that you'll be sharing the nutritional facts of granola & energy bites workshop!!! Hats off to you and your team!! I was just thinking how much effort and dedication it takes to provide such minute details, to make sure the workshop flow is smooth, there's so much that goes into planning all this!! You are simply the best."
"You are a brilliant teacher and even brilliant-er baker/recipe developer.
